Skill Path: Swimming

You focus on improving your swimming and diving, mastering the element of water.

While developing your skills in Athletics you chose to focus specifically on Swimming, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.iOY6YfGBaOvMNAor]{Underwater Marauder}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.aJUXbe9HJVvv0Mxa]{Breath Control}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Swim}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.iOY6YfGBaOvMNAor]{Underwater Marauder}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.aJUXbe9HJVvv0Mxa]{Breath Control}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bFoh3267kNLk68cU]{Quick Swim}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.MTO0spetPKyIa4sT]{Water Sprint}
